rationale: The citing paper centers on moment-to-moment psychological-process dynamics during video ad exposure, and the cited paper is specifically about high-frequency emotion dynamics (joy/surprise), attention, and retention/zapping in video ads. This strong construct and temporal-overlap makes the cited work a plausible mechanism/foundational source rather than an obviously incidental mention. The pair is also supported by an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.10.0207).
